name: CRM Dashboard
description: A simple internal CRM ("Pipeline"): pipeline stats, a live contacts table fetched from the data API with an add-contact form, all in a dark-tech dashboard shell.
prompt: Build a simple internal CRM dashboard called <name>: a top nav, a stats row (leads, pipeline value, win rate), a contacts table fetched from the contacts collection with columns for name, company, email, and status, an add-contact form that POSTs new rows and refreshes the table, and a footer.
